---
title: "The Rev. Samuel Harward Archer"
---

## The Rev. Samuel Harward Archer

**Dates:** (b. Jan 1821)

### Description

Cousin of CMY

### Biography

CMY’s grandfather, the Rev. Duke Yonge, Vicar of Cornwood, had a sister who married into the Archer family, so they were relations.  He was a brother of Fulbert Archer and the Rev. Charles Harward Archer. [LG 1952 Archer of Trelaske]

### Letters

- [To Mary Yonge, July 1st[1899]](../letters/3409_To_Mary_Yonge.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
